content:
@everyone 
2023年，我们站在一位 Deckbuilder 的先行者巨人的肩膀上，
做出了《忘却前夜》这款作品。

如今，这位巨人的续作——《杀戮尖塔2》已经正式上线。
我们惊喜地发现这一作的某些新设计，
与我们早前为游戏加入过的机制不谋而合，
这个巧合让我们深感荣幸！

感谢《杀戮尖塔》系列，
也感谢一直陪伴我们的各位守密人。

希望大家在尖塔中玩得开心！
玩累了，也别忘记返校哦！

🔹 兑换码：杀戮尖塔2
🔹 礼包内容：流明之芯×10
🔹 有效期至<t:1774108799:F>

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

In 2023, we stood on the shoulders of a pioneering giant in the Deckbuilder genre,
created the game "Morimens."

Now, the sequel to this giant—"Slay the Spire 2"—has officially launched.
We were pleasantly surprised to Discover some of the new designs in this installment,
It aligns perfectly with the mechanics we added to the game earlier,
What a coincidence—we're truly honored

Thank you to the "Slay the Spire" series,
And thank you to all the Keepers who have been with us all along.

Hope everyone has a great time in the Spire
Even if you're tired from playing, don't forget to return to school

🔹 Redemption Code: SlaytheSpire2
🔹 Gift package content: Luminous Core × 10
🔹 Valid until <t:1774108799:F>
